title: Glass PBR
description: ADDS 1024x/512x/256x PBR TEXTURE TO GLASS BLOCKS
body:
## IMPORTANT:-
**This resource pack is an edit of resource pack called** [Glass Normals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glass-normals) **by** [xirreal](https://modrinth.com/user/xirreal) **i would recommend checking it out.**

**This Texture Pack adds 1024x/256x PBR texture to all Glass Blocks. All Glass Blocks include Different Designs compare to original Texture Pack by adding more clear and seamless texture making them more appropiate for building purposes.**
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27c5dacbff1613c614e2a8b4732b6009f3501df5.jpeg)
